summary: Phase 2.5-d App Review deploy config: split frontend/backend under infra/deploy/ with independent juli-web/juli-api systemd units, Nginx vhosts (HTTPS, /health, OAuth callback proxy), placeholder-only env templates, executable smoke-test.sh, and app-review-runbook.md. All six acceptance criteria mapped to 15 contract tests; 410 unit tests pass. Review fixed broken PRD link (doc not on main) and corrected domain label in infra/deploy/README.md.

mappings.criterion: App Review deploy topology is documented under infra/deploy/ (VPS, Nginx, HTTPS, upstream ports).
Frontend (web/) and backend (FastAPI) deploy steps are separated and independently restartable.
Deploy runbook documents required env vars without committing secrets.
Smoke-test commands cover DNS, TLS, frontend load, /health, and OAuth callback route.
CI documents validation commands; full domain wiring may remain HITL on the VPS.
Out of scope for App Review: Redis, webhook service, cron, workers, Alembic, HA/multi-worker tuning.

recommendations: Wire tests/unit/test_phase_2_5_deploy_config.py into .github/workflows/pr.yml (runbook documents the command; CI does not execute it yet).
OAuth callback handler (/v1/auth/tiktok/callback) is proxied by Nginx but returns 404 until issue #259 — expected; smoke test asserts non-5xx only.
Pre-existing security follow-up: root .env.example contains real-looking TIKTOK_APP_SECRET — not introduced by #253; track separately.
Add docs/product/features/app_review_deployment/ PRD when planning slice lands on main; runbook now points to phase-2.5-deployment.md only.
